tools.name: list_cache
tools.title: List Cached Objects
tools.description: List all cached objects across all cache types (predictions, autots_models, event_risk, feature_detectors, data). Call this to discover existing IDs before calling any get_*, plot_*, or apply_* tools.

tools.name: clear_cache
tools.title: Clear Cache
tools.description: Clear cache: specific object by ID+type, an entire cache type, or all caches. Destructive — freed objects cannot be recovered.

cache_type.description: Cache type to clear (omit both params to clear all)

tools.name: load_sample_data
tools.title: Load Sample Dataset
tools.description: Load a built-in sample time series dataset. Returns data_id for use as the data_id parameter in forecast_*, detect_features, forecast_event_risk, clean_data, and get_data.

data_id.description: Cache ID — pass as data_id to other tools

tools.name: load_live_data
tools.title: Load Live Data (FRED / Stocks)
tools.description: Load live data from external sources (FRED economic data, stock tickers). Returns data_id. Requires network access.

data_id.description: Cache ID — pass as data_id to other tools

tools.name: generate_synthetic_data
tools.title: Generate Synthetic Time Series
tools.description: Generate synthetic time series data with labeled components for testing. Returns data_id.

data_id.description: Cache ID — pass as data_id to other tools

tools.name: load_data_from_file
tools.title: Load Data from File or URL
tools.description: Load a CSV from a local file path or URL. Returns data_id. CSV must have a datetime column as the first column (index).

filepath.description: Local file path or URL to CSV

data_id.description: Cache ID — pass as data_id to other tools

tools.name: get_data
tools.title: Get Cached Data
tools.description: Retrieve cached data as JSON (wide or long) or save as CSV. Requires data_id from load_sample_data, load_live_data, load_data_from_file, generate_synthetic_data, convert_long_to_wide, or clean_data.

tools.name: convert_long_to_wide
tools.title: Convert Long Format to Wide
tools.description: Convert long-format data (datetime, series_id, value columns) to wide format. Provide either data (inline dict) or data_id. Returns new data_id.

data.description: Long format data with datetime, series_id, value columns

data_id.description: Cache ID for converted wide-format data

tools.name: clean_data
tools.title: Clean Time Series Data
tools.description: Clean time series data: fill missing values and handle outliers. Provide either data (inline dict) or data_id. Returns new data_id with cleaned data.

tools.name: forecast_fast
tools.title: Fast Mosaic Ensemble Forecast
tools.description: FAST: Pre-configured mosaic ensemble forecast using fit_data (no model search). Use for quick results. Provide data or data_id. Returns prediction_id for use in get_forecast, plot_forecast, apply_constraints, apply_adjustments, get_model_params.

prediction_id.description: Cache ID — pass to get_forecast, plot_forecast, apply_constraints, apply_adjustments, get_model_params

data_id.description: Cache ID for the input data — pass as data_id to apply_adjustments when using align_last_value

tools.name: forecast_explainable
tools.title: Explainable Model Forecast
tools.description: MODERATE: AutoTS model search restricted to EXPLAINABLE models (Cassandra, TVVAR, BasicLinearModel). Use when interpretability matters. Provide data or data_id. Returns prediction_id and autots_id. Use get_forecast_components on prediction_id for component decomposition.

prediction_id.description: Cache ID — pass to get_forecast, plot_forecast, get_forecast_components, apply_constraints, apply_adjustments

autots_id.description: Cache ID — pass to get_validation_results, plot_validation

data_id.description: Cache ID for the input data — pass as data_id to apply_adjustments when using align_last_value

tools.name: forecast_custom
tools.title: Custom AutoTS Forecast
tools.description: CUSTOM: AutoTS with user-specified parameters or template. Use when forecast_fast results are insufficient. Read the autots://docs/forecast_custom_params resource for available parameters. Defaults to 'scalable' model_list. Provide data or data_id. Returns prediction_id and autots_id.

future_regressor_train.description: Future regressor for training (wide format DataFrame)

future_regressor_forecast.description: Future regressor for forecast period (wide format DataFrame)

prediction_id.description: Cache ID — pass to get_forecast, plot_forecast, get_forecast_components, apply_constraints, apply_adjustments

autots_id.description: Cache ID — pass to get_validation_results, plot_validation

data_id.description: Cache ID for the input data — pass as data_id to apply_adjustments when using align_last_value

tools.name: get_forecast
tools.title: Get Forecast Data
tools.description: Retrieve forecast values from a cached prediction as JSON or CSV. Requires prediction_id from forecast_fast, forecast_explainable, forecast_custom, or forecast_from_features. Use output='all' to get point, upper, and lower forecasts combined with a forecast_type column.

output.description: Which forecast to return. 'all' returns point, upper, and lower combined in long format with forecast_type column

format.description: Output format. Note: 'all' output uses long format automatically

tools.name: plot_forecast
tools.title: Plot Forecast
tools.description: Plot forecast with optional history and prediction intervals. Requires prediction_id from forecast_fast, forecast_explainable, forecast_custom, or forecast_from_features. Returns base64-encoded PNG image. Defaults to first series only.

tools.name: apply_constraints
tools.title: Apply Forecast Constraints
tools.description: Apply constraints to a forecast (dampen growth, enforce upper/lower bounds, or quantile clipping). Requires prediction_id from a forecast tool. Returns a new prediction_id with constrained values.

prediction_id.description: Cache ID for the constrained forecast

tools.name: apply_adjustments
tools.title: Apply Forecast Adjustments
tools.description: Apply post-hoc adjustments to a forecast. Requires prediction_id from a forecast tool. Three types: 1) 'basic'/'linear'/'ramp' — linear ramp between start/end dates with start/end values (additive or multiplicative); 2) 'align_last_value'/'alignlastvalue' — align forecast to recent history (also requires data_id); 3) 'smoothing'/'ewma' — exponential smoothing with span parameter. Optionally restrict to specific series_ids. Returns new prediction_id.

data_id.description: Cached data ID for training data (required for align_last_value)

adjustment_params.description: Adjustment parameters. For basic: {start_date, end_date, start_value, end_value, value, method='additive'|'multiplicative'}. For align_last_value: {rows, lag, method, strength}. For smoothing: {span}

series_ids.description: Series IDs to apply adjustment to. If omitted, applies to all series.

prediction_id.description: Cache ID for the adjusted forecast

tools.name: get_model_params
tools.title: Get Model Parameters
tools.description: Get model name, parameters, and transformation parameters from a cached prediction. Requires prediction_id from any forecast tool.

tools.name: get_forecast_components
tools.title: Get Forecast Component Decomposition
tools.description: Get decomposed forecast components (trend, seasonality, etc.) if available. Only works for Cassandra and TVVAR models — use forecast_explainable to guarantee these model types. Requires prediction_id.

prediction_id.description: Cached prediction ID (must be from a Cassandra or TVVAR model)

tools.name: get_validation_results
tools.title: Get Validation Results
tools.description: Get cross-validation results and top model rankings from an AutoTS model search. Requires autots_id from forecast_explainable or forecast_custom.

tools.name: plot_validation
tools.title: Plot Validation Forecasts
tools.description: Plot cross-validation forecasts from an AutoTS model search. Requires autots_id from forecast_explainable or forecast_custom. Returns base64-encoded PNG.

tools.name: forecast_event_risk
tools.title: Forecast Event Risk Probabilities
tools.description: Forecast the probability of crossing a threshold over future periods (e.g., stockout risk, capacity breach). Threshold in [0,1] is treated as a historical quantile; values outside [0,1] are absolute. Provide data or data_id. Returns event_risk_id for use in get_event_risk_results and plot_event_risk.

threshold.description: Threshold value (required). Float in [0,1] = historical quantile. Outside [0,1] = absolute threshold. Can be 2D array of shape (forecast_length, num_series).

direction.description: Detect crossing above (upper) or below (lower) the threshold

tune.description: Enable model tuning (slower but more accurate)

event_risk_id.description: Cache ID — pass to get_event_risk_results or plot_event_risk

tools.name: get_event_risk_results
tools.title: Get Event Risk Probabilities
tools.description: Get event risk probability values from a cached EventRiskForecast. Requires event_risk_id from forecast_event_risk. Returns probabilities per period per series.

tools.name: plot_event_risk
tools.title: Plot Event Risk Probabilities
tools.description: Plot event risk probabilities over the forecast horizon. Requires event_risk_id from forecast_event_risk. Returns base64-encoded PNG.

tools.name: detect_features
tools.title: Detect Time Series Features
tools.description: Detect anomalies, changepoints, level shifts, holidays, and seasonality patterns across all series. Provide data or data_id. Returns detector_id for use in get_detected_features, plot_features, and forecast_from_features.

detector_id.description: Cache ID — pass to get_detected_features, plot_features, forecast_from_features

tools.name: get_detected_features
tools.title: Get Detected Features
tools.description: Query detected features (anomalies, changepoints, level shifts, holidays, seasonality) from a cached detector. Requires detector_id from detect_features. Supports filtering by date range, specific date, or series name. Use include_components=true for time-series component values. Examples: 'was there an anomaly on 2024-12-25?', 'when was the first level shift?'

series_name.description: Optional series name to filter results

include_metadata.description: Include metadata like noise levels and scales (default: false)

tools.name: plot_features
tools.title: Plot Detected Features
tools.description: Plot detected features overlaid on the time series. Requires detector_id from detect_features. Returns base64-encoded PNG.

tools.name: forecast_from_features
tools.title: Forecast from Detected Features (Experimental)
tools.description: EXPERIMENTAL: Create a forecast using the decomposed components from a feature detector. Only use after detect_features, not as a standalone forecasting method. Requires detector_id from detect_features. Returns prediction_id for use in get_forecast, plot_forecast.

prediction_id.description: Cache ID — pass to get_forecast or plot_forecast
